2026-04-24T22:39:19.1859369Z git version 2.53.0
2026-04-24T22:39:19.1889969Z Copying '/home/runner/.gitconfig' to '/home/runner/work/_temp/49fb63fc-368b-4ed9-b1fe-f556bc692afc/.gitconfig'
2026-04-24T22:39:19.1899751Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/49fb63fc-368b-4ed9-b1fe-f556bc692afc' before making global git config changes
2026-04-24T22:39:19.1901214Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-04-24T22:39:19.1905597Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/azure-sdk-for-js/azure-sdk-for-js
2026-04-24T22:39:19.1937000Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-04-24T22:39:19.1943400Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-04-24T22:39:19.1977933Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-24T22:39:19.2279227Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-24T22:39:19.2284482Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-24T22:39:19.2320778Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-24T22:39:19.2604534Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-24T22:39:19.2611997Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-24T22:39:19.2646123Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
